name: Christmas Treasure Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 2 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
2 cups QUAKER 100% Natural Flavor, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Beat margarine and sugars in a large bowl until fluffy.
3. Blend in eggs and vanilla.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; add to margarine mixture and mix well.
5. Stir in oats and cereal.
6. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls, at least 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Press 1 almond onto each cookie.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack.
10. Cool completely.
11. Store tightly covered.
Makes 6 dozen cookies.
